description: For the elegant and sophisticated, this david beckham Instinct fragrance for men, has traces of aromas of fruits and woods on a evening in the portico. Reminiscent of stylish evenings in the city, this eau de toilette, bottled in a delectable flask, has base notes of orange, mandarin and Italian bergamot, peppered with cardamom, pimento and star anise. Quantity: 75 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
